title: Nautilocalyx bicolor
taxonomy: Nautilocalyx bicolor is a species of plant in the family Boraginaceae, commonly known as the borage family. This family includes over 200 genera and more than 2,000 species, many of which are herbaceous plants. The Boraginaceae family is part of the larger clade Asterids in the Angiosperm phylogeny. The classification of Nautilocalyx bicolor reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants within this family and clade. This classification is based on shared characteristics, morphology, and molecular analysis.

intro: Nautilocalyx bicolor is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, and its health benefits include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which may aid in wound healing and the treatment of respiratory infections.
